title: cordia cordiformis
intro: Cordia cordiformis, also known as the Ushnisha or Heart-Shaped Cordia, is a plant species that belongs to the bignonia family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Cordia cordiformis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Cordia cordiformis typically involve the use of its leaves and flowers, which are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
